title: Ena Koritsi Gia Dyo
writer: Nikos Tsiforos, Giannis Dalianidis, Polyvios Vasileiadis
actors: Alekos Alexandrakis, Zoi Laskari, Kostas Voutsas
plot: To outsmart his stern scholar brother to give him his blessing to finally get married, a frivolous slacker resorts to a bold but risky strategy; however, love is always unexpected. Can the wise tutor learn a thing or two about des...
